'''marata''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kaccha|kaccha]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-r-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kaccha|kaccha]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| marata
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mærætæth|mærætæth]] || [[word:mærætæj|mærætæj]] || [[word:mærætæsh|mærætæsh]] || [[word:mærætæ|mærætæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mararatath|mararatath]] || [[word:mararataj|mararataj]] || [[word:mararatash|mararatash]] || [[word:mararata|mararata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:maratath|maratath]] || [[word:marataj|marataj]] || [[word:maratash|maratash]] || [[word:marata|marata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:maraftath|maraftath]] || [[word:maraftaj|maraftaj]] || [[word:maraftash|maraftash]] || [[word:maraftaf|maraftaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:maratatha|maratatha]] || [[word:marataja|marataja]] || [[word:maratasha|maratasha]] || [[word:marataka|marataka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:maratath|maratath]] || [[word:marataj|marataj]] || [[word:maratash|maratash]] || [[word:marata|marata]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:maratathal|maratathal]] || [[word:maratajal|maratajal]] || [[word:maratashal|maratashal]] || [[word:maratakal|maratakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:maratathatha|maratathatha]] || [[word:maratajaja|maratajaja]] || [[word:maratashasha|maratashasha]] || [[word:marataka|marataka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:maratathan|maratathan]] || [[word:maratajan|maratajan]] || [[word:maratashan|maratashan]] || [[word:maratakan|maratakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:maratathaoro|maratathaoro]] || [[word:maratajaoro|maratajaoro]] || [[word:maratashaoro|maratashaoro]] || [[word:maratakaoro|maratakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
